events.summary: Darkness opens from stage left and only gradually reaches the far-right edge.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Leads the first glint at the far-left edge.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Answers just right of the opening spark.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: A low ember wakes after the sopranos.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass arrives last, kept deliberately restrained.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: A small right-side shimmer catches only near the end.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge barely speaks before Trigger 2.

events.summary: Measures 11–19 become a field of hard max-brightness glitter, thrown in fast irregular cuts across the ensemble.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Upper-left flashes initiate the glitter swarm.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Sop-L2 interlocks with Sop-L1 in upper-left hard glitter.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The middle-left becomes a restless engine of full-power irregular cuts.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass anchors the glitter with the deepest max-brightness strikes.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle replies arrive as bright, clipped sparks.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge throws back the latest and brightest hard sparks.

events.summary: The glare breaks into a soft right-to-left retreat with long afterimages.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Receives only the last remnant of the retreat.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Lights after the altos, then falls back into dark.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Carries the center of the decrescendo for the longest span.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: A grounded low glow lingers under the receding wave.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Starts the retreat with a soft but clear right-side lead.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge speaks first, then withdraws fastest.

events.summary: A compact pulse ignites from the middle and flicks outward in one compressed gesture.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Catches the outermost left splash at the end.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Supports the left-hand rebound after the central burst.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The first clear ignition appears in the center-left.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass answers the central pulse with a short low bloom.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: The right-middle receives the pulse after the center.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge takes the final flick outward.

events.summary: The tour-cut bridge grows for eight beats, erupts into the most complex cross-ensemble activity of the piece, then drops to a shared blackout on beat 25.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Rises first on the far left, then becomes a fast-leading edge in the dense central field.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Builds just inside the left edge, then trades rapid staggered bursts with the center.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Acts as a volatile hinge, repeatedly relaunching the most intricate cross-stage exchanges.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Throws the heaviest center-left cuts, creating the deepest pulses in the complex field.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle initiates several of the lateral surges and keeps the right flank unstable.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far right launches the brightest returns and completes the blackout release.

events.summary: The chorus return begins with the piece’s only fully unified slow glow, then the six staves separate again.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Starts in perfect unison with the ensemble, then peels left.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Shares the same opening glow before separating slightly later.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The center seam of the unified glow stays bright longest.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass anchors the common ramp and releases toward the floor.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: The right-center keeps the opening glow and then drifts outward.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge breaks away last, completing the split.

events.summary: From measure 115 onward, every light entrance is locked to actual light-chorus note onsets and released only by silence.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.
